CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT

Disclosing Party:
Nova Robotics Inc., a Delaware corporation

Receiving Party:
Bhaskar Freelance Services

This Non-Disclosure Agreement is made effective as of July 1, 2026.

1. Confidential Information. Confidential Information means any technical data, trade secret, business plans, or proprietary designs disclosed by the Disclosing Party to the Receiving Party, whether in written, oral, or electronic form.

2. Obligations. The Receiving Party shall hold all Confidential Information in strict confidence and shall not disclose it to any third party without prior written consent.

3. Term. This Agreement and the obligations herein shall remain in effect for a period of 2 years from the Effective Date, except that obligations relating to trade secrets shall survive indefinitely for as long as such information remains a trade secret under applicable law.

4. Governing Law. This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Texas, and the parties consent to jurisdiction of the courts located therein.

5. No Obligation. Nothing in this Agreement obligates either party to disclose any information or enter into any further business relationship.
